key_risks: June CPI release on July 14 could reinforce high inflation and pressure rate-sensitive holdings
FOMC minutes on July 8 may signal tighter policy path affecting equity valuations
Employment report on July 2 could shift growth expectations and small-cap momentum
Potential reversal in biotech and small-cap outperformance if risk appetite fades

portfolio.rationale: Domestic growth sensitivity aligns with strong US manufacturing PMI and Q1 GDP revision.
Recent outperformance and clinical/regulatory catalysts expected within one-month window.
Flash manufacturing PMI at 55.7 supports near-term industrial activity and orders.
Defensive exposure with positive 30-day relative performance amid elevated inflation data.
Broad diversification with reduced mega-cap concentration to capture mid/small rotation.

portfolio_rationale: Allocation tilts toward domestic cyclicals and growth areas with near-term PMI and earnings support while maintaining diversification to outperform SP500 over the one-month window.
rationale_summary: Focus on US small-cap, biotech, industrials, and healthcare for catalysts from manufacturing strength, Micron-like tech spillovers, and macro data releases before July 24 exit.
